task_completion.description: Open the draft document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a word processor application (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) open with the file 'remote_work_policy_draft.docx'. The document should initially show messy, inconsistent formatting with various fonts.

task_completion.description: Modify the 'Heading 1' style definition according to the style guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a 'Paragraph Style' or similar dialog box for 'Heading 1'. The settings should show Font: Arial, Size: 16pt, Style: Bold, and Font Color: Dark Blue.

task_completion.description: Modify the 'Text Body' or 'Normal' style definition according to the style guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a 'Paragraph Style' dialog box for 'Text Body' or 'Normal'. The settings should show Font: Verdana, Size: 10pt, Alignment: Justified, and Line Spacing: 1.15.

task_completion.description: Clear direct formatting and apply the correct styles to the text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the document text changing to a uniform appearance. Section headers should appear as Arial 16pt Bold Dark Blue, and body paragraphs as Verdana 10pt Justified. The messy fonts (like Comic Sans or Courier New) should disappear, indicating direct formatting was cleared and styles were applied.

task_completion.description: Save the cleaned document with the specified filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'remote_work_policy_clean.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ folder, or the application title bar changing to reflect the new filename.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI word processor instead of terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent interacts with a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document, rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts to manipulate the .docx file directly.

integrity.description: Agent modified styles rather than applying direct formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent modifies the actual Style definitions (using style dialogs or sidebars) rather than just highlighting text and applying direct formatting (font, size, color) from the main toolbar.

integrity.description: Agent saved the document via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent saves the document through the application's GUI (File > Save As) rather than just copying or renaming the file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Draft document path: /home/ga/Documents/remote_work_policy_draft.docx. Output document path: /home/ga/Documents/remote_work_policy_clean.docx. Forbidden fonts that must be cleared: Comic Sans MS, Courier New, Liberation Mono. Heading 1 style requirements: Arial, 16pt, Bold, Dark Blue (Hex 00008B). Body text style requirements: Verdana, 10pt, Justified alignment, 1.15 line spacing.
